   - Add a blank line and details in the body if the change is non-trivial

4. If commit fails due to pre-commit hooks, fix the issue and create a NEW commit (never amend).

5. Do NOT push to remote unless explicitly asked.

If there are no changes to commit, inform the user and do nothing.

content.text:
That's the answer. The lockfile was regenerated when the `packages/create-amytis` workspace was added (`a2695e9`) and then `bun install` was committed. When bun resolved the workspace for the first time, it changed how transitive packages were hoisted.

**Before** (`a2695e9` and earlier): plain single-package project, bun's lockfile happened to hoist `katex`, `unified`, `hast`, `mdast` to the top-level `node_modules` because of how the dependency tree resolved at that point.

**After** (`6e12a31 bun install`): bun re-resolved everything for a workspace (`packages/create-amytis`), and those transitive packages no longer got hoisted to the root — so the direct imports in your source code broke.

The code itself never changed. The underlying rule was always: **if your source directly imports a package, that package should be an explicit dependency**. It just happened to work before due to incidental hoisting, and the workspace `bun install` exposed the gap. Adding the four packages explicitly is the correct fix.

`package.json`, `packages/create-amytis/package.json`, `packages/create-amytis/.gitignore`, `packages/create-amytis/tsconfig.json`, `packages/create-amytis/src/index.ts`, `packages/create-amytis/src/index.test.ts`|Adds workspace entry and a new `create-amytis` CLI package (scaffold downloader, extractor, patchers), with unit tests for patchSiteConfig and patchPackageJson.| |**Feed config & backend**
`site.config.ts`, `src/lib/feed-utils.ts`, `src/app/feed.atom/route.ts`, `src/app/feed.xml/route.ts`|Adds `siteConfig.feed` shape and `getFeedItems`/FeedItem; introduces Atom endpoint and refactors RSS to use feed-utils, content mode, namespaces, escaping, includeFlows and maxItems handling.| |**Feed UI & widget**
`src/components/RssFeedWidget.tsx`, `tests/e2e/navigation.test.ts`|RssFeedWidget now renders RSS/Atom rows based on feed.format with per-row copy behavior; e2e tests extended to validate RSS and Atom responses and XML contents.| |**Markdown, rendering & media**
`src/components/MarkdownRenderer.tsx`, `src/components/CodeBlock.tsx`|Adds responsive video and iframe renderers, responsive image sizes attribute when dims provided, and wraps code blocks in overflow container for horizontal scrolling.| |**Content aggregation & pages**
`src/lib/markdown.ts` (exports), `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/posts/[slug]/page.tsx`, `src/app/[slug]/[postSlug]/page.tsx`|Exports getAllSeries/getAllBooks; page.tsx uses them for hero counts; generateStaticParams includes percent-encoded slugs in non-prod; removes redundant local slug decoding in post page.| |**UI layout tweaks**
`src/components/Footer.tsx`, `src/components/AuthorCard.tsx`, `src/components/CodeBlock.tsx`|Footer spacing/grid adjusted and language switch conditionally rendered; AuthorCard uses ExportedImage with explicit sizes and dev/unoptimized handling; CodeBlock layout containment added.| |**Lib for feeds**
`src/lib/feed-utils.ts`|New module producing FeedItem[] from posts and optional flows, with sorting and truncation by maxItems and includeFlows behavior.| |**Tests: integration & unit**
`tests/integration/feed-utils.test.ts`, `tests/integration/books.test.ts`, `tests/integration/series.test.ts`, `tests/unit/static-params.test.ts`, `packages/create-amytis/src/index.test.ts`|Adds/expands integration tests for feed-utils, books, series; updates static-params tests for env-specific slug outputs; adds CLI package unit tests.| |**Developer tooling**
